title: alyssum caespitosum
intro: Alyssum caespitosum, also known as lesser alyssum or small-flowered alyssum, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, alyssum caespitosum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
